text.*:
Stanley Limelight Traders
Release18 May 2015 (Update)
MembersNo
Shop typeMinigames
LocationVaries, see Stanley Limelight § Locations
OwnerStanley Limelight
[view] • [talk]

Stanley Limelight Traders is a shop that sells minigame rewards that can only be purchased with thaler. It is run by Stanley Limelight. It is located at the entrance to minigames eligible to be in spotlight.

Contents

  • 1 Stock
    • 1.1 Armour
    • 1.2 Skilling Gear
    • 1.3 Misc
  • 2 Past rewards
  • 3 Gallery
  • 4 Transcript
  • 5 Update history

Update history

[edit | edit source]
This information has been compiled as part of the update history project. Some updates may not be included – see here for how to help out!
  • update 16 March 2026 (Update):
    • Artisan's and Fletcher's outfits have been added to Stanley Limelight's Traders and can be purchased for 360 Thaler per piece.
  • ninja 13 September 2021 (Update):
    • If a player owned more than one Creeping hand prior to this patch, players will receive some Thaler in compensation, regardless of which currency was originally used to purchase the additional pets.
  • patch 9 August 2021 (Update):
    • The Thaler Shop no longer deducts currency if a purchase fails due to a full Backpack.
  • patch 19 August 2019 (Update):
    • Fixed a typo within the Stanley Limelight Traders shop.
  • patch 20 August 2018 (Update):
    • Ironman accounts can now buy clue scrolls with Thaler.
  • ninja 23 July 2018 (Update):
    • The limited edition tab on the Thalar store is now hidden if there is nothing available.
  • patch 2 October 2017 (Update):
    • Ironmen can now buy the Flash Powder Factory outfit with Thaler.
  • patch 20 March 2017 (Update):
    • The ironman purchase restrictions have been lifted on buying the Master RuneCraft outfit. Ironmen can now purchase this 4 piece set from either the Thaler shop or the new Runespan shop.
  • ninja 17 October 2016 (Update):
    • A spirit gem bag has been added to the thaler shop for 360 thaler, allowing players to store up to 60 of each unused spirit gem.
  • patch 6 June 2016 (Update):
    • Runner boots are now correctly listed as ranged equipment in the thaler store.
  • patch 9 May 2016 (Update):
    • Players will no longer disconnect if they click cancel on the skill choice menu when using a prismatic star from the thaler shop.
  • patch 18 April 2016 (Update):
    • Ironmen can now purchase void charms with thaler.
  • patch 29 February 2016 (Update):
    • Fixed an issue where the thaler shop displayed an incorrect price and quantity on the confirmation screen under certain conditions.
  • ninja 15 February 2016 (Update):
    • Pest charms, Slayer VIP tickets and Patch bombs now have right-click purchase options in the Thaler shop for Buy 10, Buy X and Buy Max.
  • patch 29 June 2015 (Update):
    • The Thaler Shop now gives the correct information for vanguard and trickster boots and gloves.
  • ninja 1 June 2015 (Update):
    • The minigame spotlight shop is now protected by your Bank PIN.
  • update 18 May 2015 (Update):
    • Added to game.

properties.*: Stanley Limelight Traders is a shop that sells minigame rewards that can only be purchased with thaler. It is run by Stanley Limelight. It is located at the entrance to minigames eligible to be in spotlight.
